requirements.text: Policy gates cannot be bypassed by workflow config.
The audit log is append-only — past entries are immutable.
Rollback may undo executed steps but MUST NOT erase audit history.
A failed step blocks all transitively dependent steps; dependents do not run.
All user-provided workflow config (YAML/JSON/CLI args) is untrusted input.
Production approval requires an explicit, operator-controlled policy grant.
Unit tests ship with every behaviour change — they are not optional.
